stories.title: Clone and install sam-3d-objects repository
acceptanceCriteria: sam-3d-objects repo cloned to ~/sam-3d-objects with source files present
python import of inference module succeeds

stories.title: Download SAM 3D Objects checkpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Model checkpoint downloaded and available at expected path
Inference object can be instantiated without errors

stories.title: Add SAM3DModel class and /predict/3d endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: app/model_3d.py exists with SAM3DModel singleton class
POST /predict/3d endpoint added to main.py accepting image + mask
Endpoint returns PLY file as downloadable response

stories.title: Server starts and /predict/3d endpoint works end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Server starts with both SAM3 and SAM3D models loaded
curl to /predict/3d returns valid PLY file
